summary: Completed testing of SEO Course Funnel Pages. All 5 course pages (Robotics, Coding, AI, Entrepreneurship, Financial Literacy) load correctly with proper content, curriculum accordions, FAQ accordions, testimonials, and CTAs. Book Free Demo button correctly redirects to /student?skill=[course-id] and skips to Step 3 (City step). Navigation between courses works. Mobile responsiveness is good.

issues: Meta description not updating - shows default 'OLL - Online Live Learning Platform' instead of course-specific description. Page titles update correctly. This is due to default meta tag in index.html taking precedence over react-helmet-async.

passed_tests: Courses list page at /courses shows all 5 courses with proper cards
Course card for robotics exists with correct data-testid
Course card for coding exists with correct data-testid
Course card for ai exists with correct data-testid
Course card for entrepreneurship exists with correct data-testid
Course card for financial exists with correct data-testid
Individual course page /courses/robotics loads correctly with title 'Robotics Classes for Kids | OLL - Learn to Build Robots'
Individual course page /courses/coding loads correctly with title 'Coding Classes for Kids | OLL - Learn Programming'
Individual course page /courses/ai loads correctly with title 'AI Classes for Kids | OLL - Learn Machine Learning'
Individual course page /courses/entrepreneurship loads correctly with title 'Entrepreneurship for Kids | OLL - Young Entrepreneur Program'
Individual course page /courses/financial loads correctly with title 'Financial Literacy for Kids | OLL - Money Management'
Course page curriculum accordion expands/collapses correctly (4 modules)
Course page FAQ accordion expands/collapses correctly (3 FAQs)
Course page testimonials section displays correctly (2 testimonials)
Course page 'Explore Other Courses' section shows 4 other courses
Book Free Demo button (hero) redirects to /student?skill=robotics
Student funnel with skill parameter skips to Step 3 (City step)
Navigation links between courses work correctly
Landing page navbar includes Courses link
Courses list page navbar includes Courses, About, Centers, Blog links
Mobile menu button works on courses list page
Mobile responsiveness - courses list page adapts correctly
Mobile responsiveness - individual course page adapts correctly
Mobile Book Demo button visible on course pages
action_items: OPTIONAL: To fix meta description SEO issue, remove the default meta description from /app/frontend/public/index.html line 7, or use data-react-helmet attribute to allow react-helmet-async to override it
critical_code_review_comments: SEO meta description not updating dynamically - the default meta tag in index.html takes precedence. Consider removing it or using data-react-helmet='true' attribute.
seed_data_creation: None - courses are defined in static CourseData.js file
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Course Funnel Pages are fully functional. All 5 courses (robotics, coding, ai, entrepreneurship, financial) have dedicated landing pages with hero, benefits, curriculum, outcomes, testimonials, FAQ, and CTA sections. Book Free Demo button passes skill as URL parameter to pre-select in student funnel. Minor SEO issue: meta description not updating dynamically due to default in index.html.
